rulings.Case Title: LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY PARTNERS VS. JOHN MORIRATY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Renewal Of Defts Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 29, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT JOHN MORIARTY's Renewal Of Deendant's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. Deny - New fact has no bearing on court's MAY-14-2012 order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JIAN HAN WU VS. SU-CHU CHEN
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 29, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT SU-CHU CHEN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA D. SAM VS. YEDER S. MORALES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 29, 2012, line 7. PLAINTIFF DIANA SAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to December 10, 2012. rulings.Case Title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. ROBERT MARTIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 29, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT ROBERT MARTIN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - five days to answer. Plaintiff not subject to FDCPA. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLE DE WALD TRUSTEE OF FRANCIS J. LEWIS VS. NATHAN WALLICK AKA NATHAN AARON PLACE
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 29, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT NATHAN PLACE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny - Court finds three day notice re non payment of rent not subject to paragraph 28 of the lease. = (501/REQ)
